name: Basil Hawkins - OP10-109 (Reprint)
effect_text: [On K.O.] Trash up to 1 card from the top of your opponent's Life cards.[Trigger] Draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
